creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 14:01:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    shells/bash          Makefile 
    shells/bash-completion Makefile 
    shells/bush          Makefile 
    shells/fish          Makefile 
    shells/gscommander   Makefile 
    shells/viewglob      Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.19      +1 -1      ports/shells/bash-completion/Makefile
  1.102     +1 -1      ports/shells/bash/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -1      ports/shells/bush/Makefile
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/shells/fish/Makefile
  1.11      +1 -1      ports/shells/gscommander/Makefile
  1.14      +1 -1      ports/shells/viewglob/Makefile
